Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot JarLauncher class path to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Runtime failure: ClassNotFoundException for org.springframework.boot.loader.JarLauncher as the class was moved to org.springframework.boot.loader.launch.JarLauncher in Spring Boot 3.

Dockerfile_full.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot JarLauncher class path to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Dockerfile_full.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException at runtime because the class org.springframework.boot.loader.JarLauncher was moved to org.springframework.boot.loader.launch.JarLauncher in Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing compilation failures and runtime incompatibilities with Java 21/Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17 bytecode, which may not leverage Java 21 features or comply with strict Java 21 build policies, though it might still compile. However, in the context of a 'UpgradeToJava21' recipe, this is the primary intent to shift the baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Groovy dependency management to resolve version conflicts with Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x manages Groovy versions differently or requires specific versions compatible with the new stack; without explicit management, transitive dependencies might pull in incompatible Groovy versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.validation-api with jakarta.validation-api to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces (jakarta.*). Code or dependencies relying on javax.validation will fail to compile or run due to missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add flyway-database-postgresql dependency to support Flyway 9+ modular driver architecture.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ (used by Spring Boot 3) removed built-in database drivers. Without this explicit dependency, Flyway will fail at runtime with a 'Database driver not found' error for PostgreSQL.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace rider-spring with rider-junit5 to align with JUnit 5 and Spring Boot 3 testing standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: rider-spring is deprecated/removed in newer versions of Database Rider. Spring Boot 3 uses JUnit 5 as the default test framework. Using the old artifact may lead to missing classes or incompatibility with JUnit 5 extensions.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from the legacy javax.persistence namespace to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: Compilation failure: the javax.persistence package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies, causing 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class and switch to the modern SecurityFilterChain bean approach required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Replace the overridden configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean method.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is no longer part of the public API in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use the lambda DSL instead of the fluent builder style.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy() fluent API is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update authorization configuration to use authorizeHttpRequests with lambda DSL and requestMatchers.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update HTTP Basic authentication configuration to use the lambda DSL with withDefaults().
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The httpBasic().and() fluent API is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The csrf().disable() fluent API is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Add the return statement to build and return the SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The new SecurityFilterChain bean method must return a SecurityFilterChain instance; omitting it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/do.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/do.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/do.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/do.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to the new package location in Spring Boot 3.3.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.web.server.LocalServerPort was removed in Spring Boot 3.3; using the old import causes a compile error.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new Apache HttpClient 5 package structure.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.HttpStatus does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5; using the old import causes a compilation error (cannot find symbol).

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new Apache HttpClient 5 package structure.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.HttpStatus does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5; code fails to compile without updating to org.apache.hc.core5.http.HttpStatus.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Replace deprecated CrudRepository method getById with getReferenceById to comply with Spring Data JPA API changes in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: Compilation error: method getById(Long) is removed from CrudRepository interface in Spring Data JPA 3.x (used by Spring Boot 3.x).
